name: Waiola Shave Ice
tagline: Honolulu institution since 1979 — cloud-soft ice that soaks up syrup better than anywhere.
mustOrder: any flavor — the ice texture is the star here
parking: Street parking on Waiola St or in the small lot behind the shop
talkStory: This is where UH Manoa students and Moiliili families have come for decades — no tourists, just neighborhood people. The owner is there most days. Won Hawaii's Best Shave Ice multiple years running.
insiderTips: It's in a residential area so don't blast music or take up the whole sidewalk. Known for having the softest, finest-shaved ice on the island — it's almost powdery, which means the syrup absorbs completely instead of pooling at the bottom.
